steps.t: Gruglock is your trainer in the Ettenmoors. Speak with them and learn about skills in the Ettenmoors.
You successfully enabled the skill <rgb=#FFFF00>March!</rgb>. Speak with Gruglock again to learn more.
You have learned to strengthen yourself and to move swiftly. Gruglock directed you to a vendor near the gate. Curious. Seek out the vendor Nadar and s…
